basic_details.job_title: Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Junior Typist, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Jajpur District Court has officially announced the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Steno and Other Posts Recruitment 2026 for a total of 25 vacancies under Advertisement No. 02/2026. The detailed notification was published on the official website at https://jajpur.dcourts.gov.in. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria of +3 (Bachelor’s degree) or equivalent, Diploma in Computer Application, Matriculation or equivalent qualification, along with Revenue Inspector Training (as applicable) and aged between 18 to 42 years can apply through offline mode. The application process is

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/SEBC/Women, 10 years for Physically Handicapped, Ex-servicemen as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university, Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute, Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board, Revenue Inspector Training
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute. Junior Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute with minimum speed of 40 words per minute in typewriting in English through computer system. Stenographer Grade-III: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute with minimum speed of 80 words in shorthand and 40 words in typewriting per minute in English through computer system. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board and Revenue Inspector Training.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-4 to Level-7 as per ORSP Rules, 2017
salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Level-4 Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- Junior Typist: Level-4 Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- Stenographer Grade-III: Level-7 Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- Salaried Amin: Level-5 Rs. 21,700/- to Rs. 69,100/-

selection_process: Written Test Shorthand and Typewriting Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Technical Knowledge Test (Practical) Viva-Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Jajpur District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jajpur.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Jajpur District Court Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Jajpur District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute. Junior Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute with minimum speed of 40 words per minute in typewriting in English through computer system. Stenographer Grade-III: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university and Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute with minimum speed of 80 words in shorthand and 40 words in typewriting per minute in English through computer system. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board and Revenue Inspector Training.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/SEBC/Women, 10 years for Physically Handicapped, Ex-servicemen as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Level-4 Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- Junior Typist: Level-4 Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- Stenographer Grade-III: Level-7 Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- Salaried Amin: Level-5 Rs. 21,700/- to Rs. 69,100/-

content_sections.heading: Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Shorthand and Typewriting Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Technical Knowledge Test (Practical) Viva-Voce Test

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Jajpur District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://jajpur.dcourts.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application forms for the Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 is 17th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post. The recruitment drive aims to fill 25 posts in total across various positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all the posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post, candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and possess a Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Stenographer Grade-III post?
faq.answer: The Stenographer Grade-III post falls under Level-7 as per ORSP Rules, 2017, with a salary ranging from Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the Jajpur District Court Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different stages of the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Shorthand and Typewriting Test, Computer Science Test (Practical), Technical Knowledge Test (Practical), and a Viva-Voce Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Jajpur District Court, which is https://jajpur.dcourts.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the salary for the Salaried Amin post?
faq.answer: The Salaried Amin post is placed at Level-5 as per ORSP Rules, 2017, with a salary scale of Rs. 21,700/- to Rs. 69,100/-.
